ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the artist's profile was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the sentiment score is associated with */,
  "num_positive" INTEGER /* Number of positive reactions */,
  "num_negative" INTEGER /* Number of negative reactions */,
  "num_neutral" INTEGER /* Number of neutral reactions */,
  "positivity" REAL /* Positivity score (0-1) */,
  "negativity" REAL /* Negativity score (0-1) */,
  "neutrality" REAL /* Neutrality score (0-1) */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment scores were last updated */,
  "user_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Total number of user feedbacks received */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend in sentiment over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics_analysis" (
  "lyrics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyrics analysis */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the lyrics analysis is associated with */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the lyrics */,
  "unique_word_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique words in the lyrics */,
  "lexical_density" REAL /* Lexical density of the lyrics (ratio of unique words to total words) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Overall sentiment score of the lyrics */,
  "emotional_density" REAL /* Measure of the emotional intensity in the lyrics */,
  "cultural_references" TEXT /* List of cultural references in the lyrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyrics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user feedback */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the feedback is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the user feedback */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the user feedback */,
  "user_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, data analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* User's subscription status */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status of the playlist */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the playlist is collaborative */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the playlist in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist track association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "playback_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the track is played in the playlist */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the track is a favorite in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_play_counts" (
  "play_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play count record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "last_played_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was last played */,
  "playback_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the playback in milliseconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for playback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_play_counts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track share */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the track */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was shared */,
  "share_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the track was shared */,
  "share_text" TEXT /* Text accompanying the share */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the share was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the track as a favorite */,
  "favorited_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was marked as a favorite */,
  "favorite_context" TEXT /* Context in which the track was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_skips" (
  "skip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track skip */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who skipped the track */,
  "skip_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was skipped */,
  "skip_reason" TEXT /* Reason for skipping the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_skips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "num_results" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_context" TEXT /* Context in which the search was performed */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
